Slippy Clone: Pixel-Perfect UI Recreation

ClientPersonal Project
Year2025

A frontend engineering challenge to recreate the complex, fluid interactions of the 'Slippy' interface. This project demonstrates high-fidelity attention to detail, advanced CSS animations, and faithful component composition.

Scope of Work

  • UI Clone
  • Frontend
  • CSS Animations
  • React
View Live SiteView Code

The Outcome.
See the results.

Visual Accuracy

+0%

Match to original design

+0%
* Pixel Matching

The Approach.
See how we did it.

Component Analysis

Atomic Design Breakdown

Deconstructed the original interface into reusable atomic components to manage complexity.

  • Atomic design methodology

  • Shared state management

  • Reusable UI primitives

Animations

Fluid Micro-Interactions

Replicated the subtle bounce, hover, and transition effects that give the original app its premium feel.

  • Framer Motion integration

  • CSS keyframes

  • Gesture handling
